summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad high-priority features: Dashboard modals, Map search API, Turn-by-turn navigation UI. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Map search API (/api/map/search) working correctly - returns locations with relevance scoring and distance calculation
Map directions API (/api/map/directions) working correctly - returns turn-by-turn steps with ETA, distance, and traffic status
Partner Dashboard Help modal opens correctly with topics: Creating Offers, Boosting Offers, Understanding Analytics
Admin Dashboard Settings modal opens with toggle options for Notifications, Privacy, Display, Audio sections
Admin Dashboard Help modal opens correctly with same topics as Partner
Driver App search modal shows Quick Places (Home, Work, Gym, School) when no query entered
Driver App search integrates with /api/map/search - returns results with distance
Turn-by-turn navigation UI appears when destination selected - shows current instruction, ETA, distance, traffic status
Offer gem markers on map are clickable and show redemption popup with discount %, gems reward, distance, and action buttons
Redemption popup shows 'Get QR Code', 'Maybe Later', and 'Navigate Here' buttons
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All high-priority features tested and working. Map search and directions APIs are MOCKED (return pre-defined Columbus, OH locations). Turn-by-turn navigation UI is visual mockup only.
mocked_data_note: ALL MAP DATA IS MOCKED - /api/map/search returns pre-defined Columbus, OH locations, /api/map/directions returns mock turn-by-turn steps. In production, these would call Mapbox or Google Maps API.
